flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Youngstown State University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.4k → $11.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Youngstown State University fell 10% between 2006 and 2009 (12.5% → 11.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Youngstown State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).
